name: FLORENTINE BRAINROT #9
description: Florentine Brainrot #9 is a windows bruise single-panel relic built around Botticelli and Low-Poly Renaissance Mallcore. Tarocchi Fiorentini assigns Aria, used here as the witness card. The Aria omen matches a stain in the metaverse museum gift shop. The notary marks it suspicious but lets it hang. Serial BOTT-9 carries codon marker GATTAAACTACCATATGTGAACTCCTAATT; Gematria marks SIDEQUEST at Σ 714.

attributes.value: a blockchain reliquary glowing inside a busted vending machine
